personal_access_token_request.name: id
personal_access_token_request.description: Unique identifier of the request for access via fine-grained personal access token. Used as the pat_request_id parameter in the list and review API calls.

personal_access_token_request.name: owner
personal_access_token_request.description: A GitHub user.

personal_access_token_request.name: permissions_added
personal_access_token_request.description: New requested permissions, categorized by type of permission.

personal_access_token_request.name: permissions_upgraded
personal_access_token_request.description: Requested permissions that elevate access for a previously approved request for access, categorized by type of permission.

personal_access_token_request.name: permissions_result
personal_access_token_request.description: Permissions requested, categorized by type of permission. This field incorporates permissions_added and permissions_upgraded.

personal_access_token_request.name: repository_selection
personal_access_token_request.description: Type of repository selection requested.

personal_access_token_request.name: repository_count
personal_access_token_request.description: The number of repositories the token is requesting access to. This field is only populated when repository_selection is subset.

personal_access_token_request.name: repositories
personal_access_token_request.description: An array of repository objects the token is requesting access to. This field is only populated when repository_selection is subset.

childParamsGroups.name: private
childParamsGroups.description: Whether the repository is private or public.

personal_access_token_request.name: created_at
personal_access_token_request.description: Date and time when the request for access was created.

personal_access_token_request.name: token_id
personal_access_token_request.description: Unique identifier of the user's token. This field can also be found in audit log events and the organization's settings for their PAT grants.

personal_access_token_request.name: token_name
personal_access_token_request.description: The name given to the user's token. This field can also be found in an organization's settings page for Active Tokens.

personal_access_token_request.name: token_expired
personal_access_token_request.description: Whether the associated fine-grained personal access token has expired.

personal_access_token_request.name: token_expires_at
personal_access_token_request.description: Date and time when the associated fine-grained personal access token expires.

personal_access_token_request.name: token_last_used_at
personal_access_token_request.description: Date and time when the associated fine-grained personal access token was last used for authentication.
